items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: BTAspectRatio
items.description: Layout utility atom that constrains its children to a fixed aspect ratio with overflow clipping and rounded corners. Use as a wrapper for images, videos, or any content that must maintain a predictable proportion.

items.name: badge
items.title: BTBadge
items.description: Status label pill. Displays variant-colored pill with optional left/right icon slots.

items.name: button
items.title: BTButton
items.description: Interactive action button with 5 variants and 2 sizes. Supports left/right icon slots and icon-only mode.

items.name: button-group
items.title: BTButtonGroup
items.description: Horizontal group of related action buttons sharing borders. Supports 1–9+ items, 5 variants (default-light, default-white, primary, destructive, warning), 2 sizes, and per-item variant mixing.

items.name: button-link
items.title: BTButtonLink
items.description: Inline hyperlink-style action atom. Text label with optional icon slots. Hover → underline + bold. Active → dims to neutral. Disabled → text.disabled.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: BTCheckbox
items.description: Checkbox atom with 7 states: uncheck, check, indeterminate, disable-uncheck, disable-check, disable-indeterminate, and error. Supports optional label and subtext. Fully accessible via native input with transparent overlay pattern.

items.name: dropdown-list
items.title: BTDropdownList
items.description: Presentational dropdown list. Four variants: list (plain text), combobox (avatar + name), checkbox (multi-select), radio (single-select). Filtering is caller-driven via update:searchQuery. Renders an empty state automatically when items is empty.

items.name: hint
items.title: BTHint
items.description: Notification indicator atom. Renders as a solid red dot (no count) or a red pill/circle containing a count value. Numbers > 99 are displayed as "99+". Three sizes: lg (dot 16px / badge 24px), md (dot 10px / badge 16px), sm (dot 8px / badge 16px with smaller font).

items.name: kbd
items.title: BTKbd
items.description: Keyboard key badge for displaying shortcut keys or hotkey combinations. Web-only (no Flutter equivalent — keyboard shortcuts are a desktop/web concept).

items.name: loading
items.title: BTLoading
items.description: Multi-type loading indicator. Five types: spinner (Lottie), pulse (Lottie), skeleton (CSS shimmer), progressbar (CSS animated bar), logo (Lottie btech brand).

items.name: radio-button
items.title: BTRadioButton
items.description: Radio button atom with 5 states: default, active, disable, disable-active, and error. Supports optional label and subtext. Uses native <input type="radio"> with transparent overlay for full accessibility. Use multiple BTRadioButton with the same v-model to build a radio group.

items.name: scrollbar
items.title: BTScrollbar
items.description: An overflow wrapper div that renders a thin, token-coloured scrollbar. Thumb: bg-subtlest (neutral-300), Track: bg-subtle (neutral-50), 4px wide.

items.name: separator
items.title: BTSeparator
items.description: A 1px visual divider line. Renders horizontal (full-width) or vertical (full-height) using the border.primary token.

items.name: slider
items.title: BTSlider
items.description: Interactive range slider atom (Figma 434:7617). Supports three layout types (default, range, vertical) and two color variants (primary, destructive). Thumb has hover/press halo (Figma 434:7227). disabled toggles interaction.

items.name: switch-field
items.title: BTSwitchField
items.description: A toggle switch atom with track + thumb animation. Supports on/off, disabled, and error states. Labels and subtext can appear on the left side, right side, or both simultaneously. An inner text variant shows a short label inside the pill track.

items.name: tag
items.title: BTTag
items.description: Removable pill label atom. Supports default and outline variants, optional left icon slot, and close button for removal.

items.name: toggle
items.title: BTToggle
items.description: Pressable pill toggle atom. Caller controls `pressed` state; component fires change(!pressed) on click. Supports default and outline variants, default and small sizes, optional left/right icon slots.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: BTToggleGroup
items.description: Generic selection container that renders a row of BTToggle items. Manages single or multiple selection state internally and exposes it via controlled value + change event. Forwards variant, size, and disabled to all children.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: BTTooltip
items.description: Hover / focus tooltip wrapping a trigger element. Renders a dark-background balloon via Teleport/portal with a rounded-tip arrow caret. Supports plain text or rich content slot.

items.name: accordion
items.title: BTAccordion
items.description: Three-component accordion system. BTAccordion is the group wrapper that manages open state (type=single/multiple). BTAccordionItem is the individual collapsible panel (separator-based, no card chrome). BTAccordionCard is a self-contained expandable card with its own header (title + subtext + chevron).

items.name: alert
items.title: BTAlert
items.description: Contextual feedback banner with icon, label, optional description, optional action button/link, and optional dismiss button.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: BTAlertDialog
items.description: Modal confirmation/information dialog with icon, title, description, and action buttons. Web (D) design — 500px wide, horizontal button layout.

items.name: avatar
items.title: BTAvatar
items.description: Circular badge displaying a user's profile image or auto-derived initials. Supports skeleton loading state. Used standalone or inside BTAvatarGroup (organism) for stacked group displays.

items.name: bar-chart
items.title: BTBarChart
items.description: Bar chart molecule wrapping ApexCharts. Supports three variants inferred from props: basic single-series (data), grouped multi-series (groups), and stacked multi-segment (stackedBars). Renders with custom BT tooltip styling and design-system color palette.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: BTBreadcrumb
items.description: Compositional breadcrumb system with 7 building-block components. Compose BTBreadcrumb > BTBreadcrumbList > BTBreadcrumbItem > (BTBreadcrumbLink | BTBreadcrumbPage | BTBreadcrumbEllipsis) with BTBreadcrumbSeparator between items.

items.name: circle-chart
items.title: BTCircleChart
items.description: Pie / donut / donut-rounded chart molecule wrapping ApexCharts. Renders coloured sections with external badge labels showing the section letter and percentage. Three visual variants selectable via the `variant` prop.

items.name: command
items.title: BTCommand
items.description: Command palette / search menu (web only). Compound component: BTCommand · BTCommandInput · BTCommandList · BTCommandEmpty · BTCommandGroup · BTCommandItem · BTCommandSeparator · BTCommandShortcut · BTCommandDialog.

items.name: dropdown
items.title: BTDropdown
items.description: Composable dropdown molecule — a trigger button paired with BTDropdownList in an overlay. Supports single-select (list/combobox/radio) and multi-select (checkbox) variants, optional search, and a custom trigger slot.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: BTDropdownMenu
items.description: Action menu that opens a floating panel of labelled items, group headers, separators, and optional keyboard shortcuts. Trigger via scoped slot; items via data array (BTDropdownMenuEntry[]).

items.name: hover-card
items.title: BTHoverCard
items.description: Hover-triggered floating card that appears after a configurable delay when the user hovers over a trigger element. Supports four-direction positioning (top/bottom/left/right) with auto-flip and alignment control. Web only (Vue + React).

items.name: input
items.title: BTInput
items.description: Pixel-perfect Figma 85-2484 outlined input. 50px height, 8px horizontal padding, floating label (14px→12px/weight-500), clear button shown only when focused+non-empty, no suffix icon in error state (only red border + helper text). Supports validator prop + validate() for programmatic form validation.

items.name: input-date
items.title: BTInputDate
items.description: Click-to-open date / date-range picker. Shows a floating BTCalendar panel (via Teleport) beneath the field when clicked. Supports single-date and range modes, floating label, error/helper text, and external form validation via the exposed `validate()` method.

items.name: input-dropdown
items.title: BTInputDropdown
items.description: Input-style trigger field that opens a BTDropdownList panel. Single-select with optional internal search filtering.

items.name: input-field-unit
items.title: BTInputFieldUnit
items.description: Split input combining a unit selector dropdown (left, dynamic width) with a floating-label text field (right). Each panel has an independent border that activates on interaction — left activates on dropdown open, right activates on field focus. Supports sanitizer (raw value), formatter (display-only), clearable button, hasSearch in unit dropdown, error, and disabled states.

items.name: input-multi-options
items.title: BTInputMultiOptions
items.description: Labeled checkbox group with wrapping flex layout (multi-select). Supports required indicator, disabled state, error state with validation text, and external validator function (expose validate()).

items.name: input-multiple-field
items.title: BTInputMultipleField
items.description: Multi-value tag input. Supports free-text tags (Enter to commit) and predefined items via checkbox dropdown. Wrap and scroll layout types.

items.name: input-rich-editor
items.title: BTInputRichEditor
items.description: Rich text input field with a floating label, Quill-powered toolbar (bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, font-size, ordered/unordered list, text alignment, link, image, attach, emoji, undo, redo), character counter, and full validation / error / disabled / helper-text states.

items.name: input-search
items.title: BTInputSearch
items.description: Standalone search input field (does not wrap BTInput). Matches Figma node 750-2949 exactly: 12px×8px padding, 8px gap, radius-sm border, 12px/500/16px typography. Includes search icon (left), animated clear/cancel button (right, shown when focused + non-empty), error state (red border + red text), helper/validation text below, and optional validator function.

items.name: input-single-options
items.title: BTInputSingleOptions
items.description: Labeled radio button group with wrapping flex layout. Supports required indicator, disabled state, error state with validation text, and external validator function (expose validate()).

items.name: input-text-area
items.title: BTInputTextArea
items.description: Standalone multiline text input. Auto-grows height from 80px to 160px as the user types, then shows a scrollbar when content exceeds the maximum height. Supports floating label, top-right clear button (visible when focused and non-empty), character counter when maxLength is set, and a validator prop for inline form validation.

items.name: input-time
items.title: BTInputTime
items.description: Masked time text-input field. Accepts digits and auto-formats them into HH:mm, HH:mm:ss, or hh:mm a. No popup — user types directly into the field.

items.name: item
items.title: BTItem
items.description: Generic list item row with optional left media (icon/avatar/image), title+description, and optional right action (button/label/icon). Three container types: default, outline, muted.

items.name: line-chart
items.title: BTLineChart
items.description: Line / area chart molecule wrapping ApexCharts. Renders one or more smooth line series. Supports Figma variants `line` and `area`. Legacy `area` prop is still supported for backward compatibility. Shared tooltip shows all series values at the hovered point.

items.name: pagination
items.title: BTPagination
items.description: Data pagination molecule. Three variants: 'number' (first/prev/pages/next/ last), 'display' (rows-per-page selector + prev/next), and 'step' (Step N of M + Prev/Next).

items.name: popover
items.title: BTPopover
items.description: Floating content panel triggered by any element. Composes three sub-components — BTPopover (root), BTPopoverTrigger (click target), BTPopoverContent (panel) — mirroring the shadcn/Radix composition pattern. Supports align start/center/end and side top/bottom/left/right. Portal-rendered via Vue Teleport.

items.name: step-number
items.title: BTStepNumber
items.description: Step / page pill. Five states: default (bordered), hover, active (subtle bg + brand border), disabled (no border), and ellipsis (⋯ icon, non-interactive).

items.name: tabs
items.title: BTTabs
items.description: Tab strip molecule with two variants: 'segmented' (pill tray with primary fill on active) and 'line' (flat row with primary underline on active). Controlled via v-model:activeIndex. Supports optional leading/trailing icon slots per tab index.

items.name: tooltip-pagination-step
items.title: BTTooltipPaginationStep
items.description: PaginationStep / onboarding step balloon with navigation buttons. Standalone and presentational — positioning is the caller's responsibility.

items.name: tree
items.title: BTTree
items.description: Recursive data-driven tree component. Pass a list of BTTreeNode objects — nesting depth is inferred from children arrays, expand/collapse state is managed internally with a CSS grid-template-rows animation, and level-based background tinting is applied automatically.

items.name: avatar-group
items.title: BTAvatarGroup
items.description: Stacked group of BTAvatar instances with horizontal negative-margin overlap. Renders a "+N" overflow counter when items exceed `max`. Stacking offsets match Figma 504:705 specs (8/10/12/16/20/32 px per size).

items.name: calendar
items.title: BTCalendar
items.description: Calendar date picker supporting single-date, date-range, and preset selection modes. Composes BTButton for navigation and footer, BTCalendarGrid for the day grid.

items.name: card
items.title: BTCard
items.description: Flexible card organism with three visual variants: default (full card with optional body + Cancel/Submit footer), small (compact, no footer), and image (top image + default structure). Footer uses BTButton atoms.

items.name: carousel
items.title: BTCarousel
items.description: Horizontal or vertical sliding carousel with animated transitions, touch/swipe support, mouse-wheel scroll, navigation buttons, and dot indicators. Compose BTCarouselItem children inside for individual slides.

items.name: chart-card
items.title: BTChartCard
items.description: Wrapper organism that adds a title header, optional summary stats row, and optional legend row above any chart child (BTBarChart, BTLineChart, BTCircleChart). Toggling `hasCard` wraps everything in a bordered card container.

items.name: data-table
items.title: BTDataTable
items.description: Data table organism with toolbar, filter tags, table title, rows, fixed-column variants, horizontal scroll indicator, and display pagination.

items.name: direction
items.title: BTDirection
items.description: Form panel organism with a white header (title + optional subtext + optional top-right link), a flexible content slot, and a grey footer with a primary action button and optional secondary button. Stateless — caller owns all interaction logic.

items.name: drawer
items.title: BTDrawer
items.description: Right-side sliding panel (D-Drawer). Teleports to <body> via Vue Teleport. 400 px wide, full viewport height, rounded left corners, shadow cast leftward. Footer has two equal-width buttons (secondary left, primary right).

items.name: empty-state
items.title: BTEmptyState
items.description: Empty/error state organism with 7 variants. Error variants (400/401/404/500/under-maintenance) show a large illustration, title, subtext, error message, and an optional action button. Simple variants (no-data/no-result) show a small illustration and a single label line.

items.name: modal
items.title: BTModal
items.description: Centred modal dialog with header (title + optional subtext + optional close button), optional content slot, and optional footer with checkbox plus secondary/primary action buttons. Backdrop click dismisses when `dismissable` is true. Three width presets: sm (500px), md (720px), lg (1042px).

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: BTNavigationMenu
items.description: Horizontal top navigation bar for desktop layouts. Two types: menu (logo + text nav items + search + profile) and tab-style (logo + BTTabs or segmented pills + optional search). Web only — no Flutter implementation.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: BTSidebar
items.description: Collapsible navigation sidebar for desktop layouts. Supports two widths (258 px expanded / 64 px collapsed), a four-level item hierarchy (Main → Submenu → Sub Submenu, Sub Title, Divider), header branding, search input, and a footer user profile. Web-only (D-prefix Figma frame).

items.name: toast
items.title: BTToast
items.description: Toast notification system with imperative API. BTToaster is mounted once at the app root; BTToast renders individual cards. 6 types (default, success, error, warning, info, description) and 9 positions.

items.name: form-field
items.title: BTFormField
items.description: Utility wrapper that provides a linked <label>, helper/error text display, and aria wiring (aria-invalid, aria-required, aria-describedby) for any slotted BT input component. Provides 'bt-form-field-id' via inject so slotted inputs can link their id to the label's htmlFor. No validation logic.
